WARNING: the following wellformedness checks failed!

 Formula guardedness
====================

  Lemma `L' cannot be converted to a guarded formula:
    universal quantifier without toplevel implication
      "∀ y #j. (B( y ) @ #j) ∨ (C( y ) @ #j)"
    in the formula
      "∀ x #i.
        (A( x ) @ #i) ⇒
        ((∀ y #j. (B( y ) @ #j) ∨ (C( y ) @ #j)) ∧
         (∀ z #k. (A( z ) @ #k) ∨ (C( z ) @ #k)))"
*/
